raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Two of the most sensitive and specific serology tests have been brought into Ventura County for COVID-19 study.",
    "The study aims to inform future policy and understand the populations most affected by COVID-19.",
    "The study will provide insights on how long antibodies last and whether they confer protection from future COVID infections.",
    "The prevalence of COVID-19 antibodies will be assessed through the study, including frequency in specific sub-groups based on exposure or vulnerability.",
    "Differences in disease impact among various groups will be evaluated as part of the study.",
    "Bio-Rad Laboratories and Abbott Laboratories provide lab-based serology tests that require a blood draw for accurate results.",
    "The study will utilize recommended testing practices to provide an accurate model for public health understanding.",
    "The study's accuracy depends on a true cross-section of the community participating in the testing."
  ]
}
```
